articles.title: EV Sales in NZ Hit Record High: What It Means for MBI Demand
articles.excerpt: New Zealand's electric vehicle registrations have surged, creating growing demand for specialised EV breakdown insurance products.

articles.title: ICNZ Reports Rising Vehicle Repair Costs Across NZ
articles.excerpt: The Insurance Council of NZ notes that vehicle repair inflation has outpaced CPI, with average mechanical repair costs up 18% over two years.

articles.title: NZ's Aging Vehicle Fleet Creates MBI Opportunity
articles.excerpt: With the average age of NZ vehicles exceeding 14 years, the case for mechanical breakdown protection has never been stronger.

articles.title: Japanese Import Safety Ratings: Which Models Hold Value Best
articles.excerpt: A breakdown of safety and reliability data for the most popular Japanese import models in the NZ market.

articles.title: FMA Guidance Update on MBI Product Disclosure
articles.excerpt: The Financial Markets Authority has updated its guidance for MBI providers on clear disclosure of exclusions in product documentation.

articles.title: EV Battery Degradation: What NZ Owners Are Experiencing
articles.excerpt: First-hand data from NZ EV owners on real-world battery degradation rates and the growing need for out-of-warranty battery protection.
